Starts with the Right Shower

Zero-Entry Shower Systems

The safest shower design available — completely barrier-free with no threshold to step over. Perfect for anyone prioritizing fall prevention without sacrificing a premium look. Our solid surface systems come with a lifetime leak-free warranty.

Our Solutions

Shower Solutions for Every Home

From simple safety upgrades to full accessible remodels — every solution is built to last a lifetime.

Most Popular

Zero-Entry Showers

A completely barrier-free entrance — no threshold to step over. The gold standard for accessibility, safety, and modern luxury. Built with solid surface panels that are waterproof for life.
Explore option →

Low-Threshold Showers

A modest curb that dramatically reduces step height while containing water. An ideal balance of safety and function for many households.
Explore option →
Trending

Tub-to-Shower Conversions

Remove an old, underused bathtub and replace it with a spacious, functional walk-in shower that maximizes your bathroom space and daily usability.
Explore option →

Walk-In Shower Systems

Custom-sized solid surface systems built for beauty and durability. Minimal grout lines, zero mold risk, and a spa-like appearance that's easy to clean.
Explore option →
Essential

Grab Bars & Safety Features

Strategically placed grab bars, fold-down benches, handheld showerheads, and non-slip surfaces — the details that dramatically reduce daily fall risk.
Explore option →

Full Accessible Remodels

A complete bathroom transformation — shower, flooring, fixtures, layout — designed from the ground up for independence, safety, and enduring style.
Explore option →
Bathroom Safety Matters

The Features That Keep Your Family Safe

Falls in the bathroom are the leading cause of in-home injuries for adults over 65. The right design changes everything — and they don't have to look institutional.

Zero-Threshold Entry

Eliminates the #1 fall hazard — the step in and out of a traditional tub or raised shower.

Integrated Seating & Benches

Built-in fold-down or fixed seating so bathing never requires balancing on one foot.

Strategically Placed Grab Bars

Professionally positioned grab bars that provide support exactly where it's needed most.

Non-Slip Surface Technology

Textured, grip-optimized floor materials that remain safe even when wet — without ugly mats.

Why Level Access Baths

What Makes Us Different from the National Brands

The big accessible bathroom chains are mostly run by private equity. Their focus is completing jobs and moving on. Ours is making sure your needs are actually met — and that the person who shows up to your home knows exactly what they're doing.

Owner-Installed. Every Job.

The person you speak with is the person who installs your shower. No handoffs, no strangers, no surprises.

500+ Showers of Hands-On Experience

Our installer has personally completed over 500 accessible shower projects — including years working inside the national brand system. We know the process inside out.

Locally Owned. No Investors. No Quotas.

We're not beholden to corporate benchmarks or investor returns. Every decision we make is centered on doing right by the homeowner — full stop.

Specialist, Not Generalist

We do one thing: accessible bathroom design and installation. That focus means better outcomes, fewer mistakes, and a result you'll live confidently with for years.

Transparent Pricing

What Does a Bathroom Remodel Actually Cost?

One of the biggest frustrations homeowners have is getting a quote only after sitting through a long sales presentation. That's not how we work. Use this tool to get a real ballpark — then call us for your exact free quote.

For Healthcare Professionals

Refer a Patient.
We'll Handle the Rest.

If you're an occupational therapist, discharge planner, home health coordinator, or physical therapist recommending bathroom modifications — Level Access Baths is your trusted installation partner in the Omaha and Council Bluffs area.

We follow OT recommendations precisely — no substitutions without your approval
Fast turnaround — critical for discharge timelines and post-acute care transitions
ADA and aging-in-place design expertise — we speak your language
Simple referral process — one call or email gets the ball rolling for your client
